subject: A very large, imposing armored alien figure in blue and white battle armor with a horned helmet, pointing one arm forward in a commanding gesture
description: A large, powerfully built alien figure dominates the frame in full battle armor. The armor is primarily blue and white with gold accents, and the figure wears a distinctive horned helmet with a white smooth dome similar to the Frieza clan design. One arm is extended outward in a commanding pointing gesture. The figure's build is considerably larger and more imposing than Frieza's slim frame. The background shows dramatic energy streaks in pink, purple, and white, radiating from the figure. Image quality is low resolution, limiting fine detail confirmation.
foreground: Large armored alien figure with horned helmet, arm extended in commanding point
background: Pink, purple, and white energy streaks on dark field
